languages.text: {n}Триасомата послушно позволяет себя увести. Мужчина не прекращает смотреть на аквилу и бормотать молитвы, пока не скрывается из вида.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Триасомата послушно позволяет себя увести. Мужчина не прекращает смотреть на аквилу и бормотать молитвы, пока не скрывается из вида.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata, now at peace, closes his eyes and whispers,{/n} "Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}
{n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}

languages.text: {n}トライアスモータは今や平和を手に入れた。目を閉じ、ささやく。{/n}「御礼、御方様」
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata, now at peace, closes his eyes and whispers,{/n} "Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: トライアスモータは今や平和を手に入れた。目を閉じ、ささやく。「御礼、御方様。」

languages.text: {n}三相体顺从地任由人带走。他的眼睛一直盯着双头鹰徽记，低声祈祷着，直到消失在你的视线里。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}三相体顺从地任由人带走。他的眼睛一直盯着双头鹰徽记，低声祈祷着，直到消失在你的视线里。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le Triasomata se laisse emmener sans broncher. Les yeux rivés sur l'Aquila, il marmonne des prières jusqu'à ce que vous le perdiez de vue.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Triasomata se laisse emmener sans broncher. Les yeux rivés sur l'Aquila, il marmonne des prières jusqu'à ce que vous le perdiez de vue.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El triasómata, obediente, permite que se lo lleven. El hombre no aparta la vista del Aquila, rezando hasta que lo pierdes de vista.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El triasómata, obediente, permite que se lo lleven. El hombre no aparta la vista del Aquila, rezando hasta que lo pierdes de vista.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Üçyeköz, itaatkârca götürülmesine izin veriyor. Adam gözlerini Çift Başlı Kartal'dan ayırmıyor, gözden kaybolana dek dualar mırıldanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Üçyeköz, itaatkârca götürülmesine izin veriyor. Adam gözlerini Çift Başlı Kartal'dan ayırmıyor, gözden kaybolana dek dualar mırıldanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Triasomata lässt sich bereitwillig abführen. Der Mann lässt den Adler nicht aus den Augen und murmelt einige Gebete, ehe er aus deinem Sichtfeld verschwindet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata obediently allows himself to be led away. The man keeps his eyes fixed on the Aquila, murmuring prayers until he is lost to your sight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Triasomata lässt sich bereitwillig abführen. Der Mann lässt den Adler nicht aus den Augen und murmelt einige Gebete, ehe er aus deinem Sichtfeld verschwindet.{/n}
